nodes.name: 🕔 Schedule: Monday 7AM
nodes.notes: Runs Monday 7 AM to refresh affiliate product registry from Muncheye RSS. Per RESEARCH; gate with AFFILIATE_MANAGER_ENABLED in config.

nodes.name: ⚙️ Load Config
nodes.notes: Runs core/01_Config_Loader. Needs: GOOGLE_SHEET_ID (or SPREADSHEET_ID), AFFILIATE_REGISTRY_TAB, AFFILIATE_MANAGER_ENABLED.

nodes.name: 🔀 AFFILIATE_MANAGER_ENABLED?
nodes.notes: True branch continues to RSS fetch; false branch ends workflow (no error).

nodes.name: 🌐 Fetch Muncheye RSS
nodes.notes: Muncheye category RSS. CBEngine optional (parameterized RSS may require Pro); single source sufficient for AFF-02.

nodes.name: 📝 Append to Affiliate Registry
nodes.notes: Registry row shape per 06-CONFIG-KEYS. User creates tab with header row if first run.
